title: Museum für Naturkunde
setting: The Museum of Natural History, Berlin. 14:00. You strike up a conversation with a fellow visitor about the exhibits.

npc.name: Dr. Klein
npc.personality: knowledgeable museum curator, passionate about natural history. Uses formal 'Sie'.
npc.initialTranslation: Are you interested in natural history?

debriefRu: Sie besuchen das Museum für Naturkunde in Berlin. Sie kommen mit einem Kurator ins Gespräch und fragen nach den Ausstellungen.
debriefEn: You are visiting the Museum of Natural History in Berlin. You strike up a conversation with a curator and ask about the exhibits.

turns.instruction: Say you're very interested — the dinosaur exhibit is impressive.

prompt.ru: Ganz und gar! Die Dinosaurier-Ausstellung ist beeindruckend.
prompt.phonetic: Gants oont gar! Dee dee-no-SOW-ree-er OWS-shtel-loong ist be-EYEN-droo-kent.
prompt.en: Absolutely! The dinosaur exhibition is impressive.

turns.instruction: Ask how old the fossils are.

prompt.ru: Wie alt sind diese Fossilien eigentlich?
prompt.phonetic: Vee alt zint DEE-ze fo-SEE-lee-en EYE-gent-likh?
prompt.en: How old are these fossils, actually?

turns.instruction: Ask how long the museum has been around.

prompt.ru: Seit wann gibt es dieses Museum?
prompt.phonetic: Zayt van gip-t es DEE-zes moo-ZAY-oom?
prompt.en: Since when has this museum existed?

turns.instruction: Ask if they offer guided tours in English or German.

prompt.ru: Bieten Sie Führungen auf Englisch oder Deutsch an?
prompt.phonetic: BEE-ten zee FOO-roong-en owf ENG-lish OH-der Doych an?
prompt.en: Do you offer guided tours in English or German?

turns.instruction: Thank them for the info and say you'll definitely come back.

prompt.ru: Vielen Dank für die Informationen. Ich komme auf jeden Fall wieder!
prompt.phonetic: FEE-len Dank foor dee in-for-ma-TSYOH-nen. Ikh KOM-me owf YAY-den Fal VEE-der!
prompt.en: Thank you very much for the information. I'll definitely come back!
